# pfsense_user (Resource)

Manages a pfSense local [user](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/usermanager/index.html) account. Users can be assigned privileges and group memberships for controlling access to the web GUI and system services.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Username. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, dots, hyphens, and underscores (max 32 characters).

### Optional

- `apply` (Boolean) Apply change, defaults to `true`.
- `authorized_keys` (String, Sensitive) SSH authorized keys (raw public key text, base64-encoded for storage in pfSense config).
- `custom_settings` (Boolean) Enable per-user GUI settings (CSS theme, dashboard columns, command history).
- `dashboard_columns` (String) Number of dashboard columns (default '2'). Only effective when custom_settings is enabled.
- `description` (String) Full name or description of the user.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the user account is disabled.
- `expires` (String) Account expiration date in MM/DD/YYYY format. Empty string or omitted means no expiration.
- `groups` (List of String) List of group names the user belongs to (excluding the implicit 'all' group).
- `ipsec_psk` (String, Sensitive) IPsec pre-shared key. Must contain only ASCII characters.
- `keep_history` (Boolean) Keep command history for this user. Only effective when custom_settings is enabled.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) User password. Required when creating a new user. Write-only (cannot be read back from pfSense, only the bcrypt hash is stored).
- `privileges` (List of String) List of privilege names assigned to the user (e.g. 'page-all' for full admin access).
- `webgui_css` (String) Web GUI CSS theme file (e.g. 'pfSense.css'). Only effective when custom_settings is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `scope` (String) User scope ('system' for built-in users, 'user' for user-created).
- `uid` (String) Numeric user ID (auto-assigned).
